response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of hands-on development, including recent fullstack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at their current role. Strong testing culture (TDD, custom test frameworks, testing workshops) and demonstrated architecture depth across web, backend, and infrastructure. Minor gaps exist around Nest.js, Kotlin, and the specific test frameworks named in the JD, but the fundamentals and adjacent experience make these low-risk.
strengths: Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple recent roles, well beyond the 6-year bar
Hands-on AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — a rare required skill
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored testing libraries, and taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin and Python are absent; Java experience appears dated (robotics work pre-2018)
Named testing tools (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly listed, though testing expertise is clearly transferable
